description: A declarative, grain-scoped automation rule: Trigger → When (criteria, all match) → Then (actions, in order). Ships dormant (enabled off) and is rejected at save if it has no grain or targets a field outside the Automatable-Field allowlist.

fields.description: Dormant by default: nothing fires until an operator ticks this on (and the master kill switch is on).
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Among matching rules, lower priority fires first; ties break by creation order.
fields.label: Priority

fields.description: The event that fires this rule. v1: a CRM Task marked Done.
fields.label: Trigger Type

fields.description: The activity type whose completion fires this rule. Must exist as a CRM Task Type.
fields.label: Task Type

fields.description: Grain axis. At least one of vertical / group / program must be set — a rule with no grain is rejected (no global rule). Blank axis = wildcard.
fields.label: Vertical

fields.description: Grain axis. Blank = wildcard for this axis.
fields.label: Group

fields.description: Grain axis. Blank = wildcard for this axis.
fields.label: Program

fields.description: Structured conditions on the completed task's activity context — ALL must match. No rows = the rule matches on grain + trigger alone.
fields.label: Criteria

fields.description: Actions to run in order when the trigger fires and all criteria match.
fields.label: Actions

name: CRM Automation Rule
